_comments: Train ML Model — thin Action boundary over TrainingEngine.trainModel.
Type='Custom' + DriverClass binds to the @RegisterClass(BaseAction,'PredictiveStudioTrainModelAction') class.
The action validates PipelineID, delegates to the engine (production seams), and maps the result.

fields.Name: Train ML Model
fields.Description: Trains a predictive model from an ML Training Pipeline definition. Carves a locked holdout, trains via the sidecar, persists an immutable Draft ML Model, and flags single-feature dominance (possible target leakage). Outputs the new model id, its honest holdout metrics, and whether it was leakage-flagged.

fields.Name: PipelineID
fields.Description: Id of the MJ: ML Training Pipelines row to train.

fields.Name: MaxRows
fields.Description: Optional cap on the number of training rows pulled from the target entity.

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: Id of the produced (Draft) MJ: ML Models row.

fields.Name: HoldoutMetrics
fields.Description: JSON of the metrics scored once on the locked holdout set the search never saw (the honest performance number).

fields.Name: LeakageFlagged
fields.Description: True when one feature dominates the model's predictions (possible target leakage). A flagged model stays Draft and needs human sign-off before promotion.
Model trained and persisted (Draft).
PipelineID is missing.
The training engine failed (pipeline not found, sidecar error, or a save failure).

_comments: Score Record Set — thin Action boundary over the MLModelInferenceProcessor scoring work type.
Validates ModelID + Scope, delegates scope resolution + scoring to the runner, returns counts +
ephemeral predictions OR confirms a write-back.

fields.Name: Score Record Set
fields.Description: Scores a set of records with a trained ML Model. The scope selects records (explicit ids / a saved view / a list / an entity+filter / a single record). Returns the scored count and either the ephemeral predictions or confirmation that scores were written back to the target.

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: Id of the MJ: ML Models row to score with.

fields.Name: Scope
fields.Description: JSON describing the records to score. Populate exactly one of: records (id/pk array), viewId, listId, filter ({entityName, extraFilter, maxRows}), single ({entityName, primaryKey}).

fields.Name: WriteBack
fields.Description: Optional. true to write scores back with the model's default mapping, or an object { OutputMapping: ... } to write to a specific column/child record. When omitted, predictions are returned ephemerally.

fields.Name: ScoredCount
fields.Description: Number of records successfully scored.

fields.Name: WroteBack
fields.Description: True when scores were written back to the target (predictions are then NOT returned ephemerally).

fields.Name: Predictions
fields.Description: JSON array of ephemeral predictions ({recordId, score, class}), present only when WriteBack was not requested.
Records scored (predictions returned or written back).
ModelID is missing, or Scope is missing/empty/populates no selector.
Scope resolution or the scoring run failed (model/artifact not found, sidecar error).

_comments: Run Experiment Session — thin Action boundary over ExperimentOrchestrator.runSession.
Validates that an APPROVED PlanSpec is supplied, parses Budget + ExperimentID, delegates, maps the result.

fields.Name: Run Experiment Session
fields.Description: Executes an approved modeling plan as an experiment session — running its proposed experiments in waves to completion or until the budget bound, maintaining a leaderboard. Outputs the session id, the best (winning) model id, the final leaderboard, and why the session stopped.

fields.Name: PlanSpec
fields.Description: The approved modeling plan (ModelingPlanSpec JSON) to execute. Must have Approved=true — execution is gated on user approval.

fields.Name: ExperimentID
fields.Description: Optional id of an existing MJ: Experiments definition to attach the session to. When omitted, a new durable Experiment is created from the plan.

fields.Name: Budget
fields.Description: Optional budget override ({ MaxRuns, MaxComputeCost, MaxWallclockMinutes }). When omitted, the plan's ProposedBudget is used.

fields.Name: SessionID
fields.Description: Id of the MJ: Experiment Sessions row that was executed.

fields.Name: BestModelID
fields.Description: Id of the best (winning) model produced, or null when no iteration produced one.

fields.Name: Leaderboard
fields.Description: JSON of the final leaderboard, best-first ({ IterationID, Metric, ModelID }).

fields.Name: StopReason
fields.Description: Why the session stopped: completed, or a clean budget pause (budget-maxRuns / budget-maxComputeCost / budget-maxWallclock).
Experiment session ran to completion or paused cleanly on the budget.
PlanSpec is missing or not a valid modeling plan.
The PlanSpec is not approved (Approved is not true) — execution is gated on user approval.
The orchestrator failed during execution.

_comments: Promote ML Model — thin Action boundary over the model lifecycle transition.
Enforces the leakage sign-off gate: a leakage-flagged model is refused without SignOff=true.
Lifecycle-only — never edits metrics, only Status.

fields.Name: Promote ML Model
fields.Description: Transitions an ML Model through its lifecycle (Validated / Published / Archived). Enforces the leakage sign-off gate — a model flagged for possible target leakage cannot be promoted unless SignOff=true. Lifecycle-only: never edits the model's metrics or artifact, only its Status.

fields.Name: ModelID
fields.Description: Id of the MJ: ML Models row to transition.

fields.Name: TargetStatus
fields.Description: The lifecycle status to move the model to: Validated, Published, or Archived.

fields.Name: SignOff
fields.Description: Human/agent sign-off that overrides the leakage gate. Required (true) to promote a leakage-flagged model; ignored for clean models.

fields.Name: Status
fields.Description: The model's new lifecycle status, on success.
Model transitioned to the target status.
ModelID is missing, or TargetStatus is missing/not one of Validated/Published/Archived.
The model was flagged for possible target leakage and cannot be promoted without SignOff=true.
No ML Model exists with the provided ModelID.
The status transition failed to save.
An unexpected error occurred while promoting the model.
